name: grok-image-worker
description: A Cloudflare Pages image generation proxy and Chinese web UI for OpenAI-compatible Grok APIs.

scripts.check: node --check functions/_lib/image-api.js && node --check functions/api/config.js && node --check functions/api/auth.js && node --check functions/api/generate.js && node --check public/app.js && node --test test/parser.test.mjs
